subject: [DCAE] DCAEGEN2-Services Service Mesh Patch
commit_message:
[DCAE] DCAEGEN2-Services Service Mesh Patch

Service Mesh patch for DCAE, changing port names to http.
Remove aaf-cm readiness check, set tlsServer to false (excluding restconf)
Added environment variables to pods to solve CBS problems
Disable VES authentcation in SM override

Change-Id: I42a12912f471d89bd4ebc6181f5454140e54a605
Issue-ID: OOM-2820
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-3277
Signed-off-by: rope252 <gareth.roper@est.tech>
Signed-off-by: Vijay Venkatesh Kumar <vv770d@att.com>

Patch Set 18: Code-Review-1

(5 comments)

I just tested it on SM cluster and found some problems in the AAI communication for the PRH.
The internal AAI pod port 8080 cannot be used in SM case, as the communication must go through the Service Port, which is 80.

Patch Set 18:

For the AAI connections there will be 2 options:
- enabled TLS: https://aai.onap:8443
- disabled TLS: http://aai.onap:80
The port 8080 is only a pod internal port, but no service port
therefor we need to make the AAI settings for PRH, TCAGEN2, SLICE_ANA
dependent of the TLS setting
